visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Arrow Mean
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the mean calculation to be a single concise arrow function using `reduce()`.

solution.code: const mean = (arr) => arr.length === 0 ? 0 : arr.reduce((a, b) => a + b) / arr.length;
solution.explanation: Using a ternary operator and the `reduce` method allows for a very concise implementation of common mathematical aggregates like the mean.
